---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(pracma)
#library(peakPick)
library(quantmod)
library(ggpmisc)
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(forecast)
library(tsibble)
library(broom)
library(tidyquant)
library(tsbox)
library("pheatmap")
library("RColorBrewer")
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggfortify)
library(viridis) # Default Color Maps from 'matplotlib' 
library(hrbrthemes)
library(data.table)
library(superheat)
```

## load existing/saved environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
load(file=saved_path)
```

# save environment (.RData)
```{r}
Path_1 <- dirname(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
saved_path <- paste(Path_1, "df_list.RData",  sep = "/")
save.image(file=saved_path)
```

## Read .csv files
```{r}
subfolder_list <- list.dirs(path =Path_1, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
subfolder_list  <- subfolder_list [ grepl("Kymo_", subfolder_list) ]
```

# Neurite length
```{r}
length_list<- list()
freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)
pixel <- 0.1625 # set pixel size

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(subfolder_list))  
{
  csv_list <- list.files(subfolder_list[n],pattern = "^Tip_actin_(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = T,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = T, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  df <- do.call("cbind", lapply(csv_list, read.csv, header = TRUE))
  df <-df[, grep("Tip.point",  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- mapply(`*`,df, pixel)
  df <-pracma::hampel(df, k=3)$y # remove jumping spikes
  colnames(df)<- paste("Length", seq( from = 1, to = ncol(df)  ),  sep = ".")
  
  length_list[[n]] <-df

}

subfolder_name_list <- subfolder_list %>% fs::path_file()
names(length_list) <- gsub("Kymo_", "", subfolder_name_list)
```

# WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv and WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv are of the same neuron
```{r}
colnames(length_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv) <- c("Length.7", "Length.8")
length_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv <-  cbind(length_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv, length_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv)
length_list <- length_list[-117]
```

# Actin intensity at neurite tip (70 pixels)
```{r}
Tip_actin_list<- list()

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(subfolder_list))  
{
  csv_list <- list.files(subfolder_list[n],pattern = "^Tip_actin_(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  df <- do.call("cbind", lapply(csv_list, read.csv, header = TRUE))
  
  df <-df[, grep("Integerated.intensity",  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- mapply(`*`,df, 1/10000)
  #df <-pracma::hampel(df, k=5)$y # remove jumping spikes
  
  colnames(df)<- paste("Tip_actin", seq( from = 1, to = dim(df)[2] ),  sep = ".")
  Tip_actin_list[[n]]<- df

}
names(Tip_actin_list) <- names(length_list)
```

# WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv and WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv are of the same neuron
```{r}
colnames(Tip_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv) <- c("Tip_actin.7", "Tip_actin.8")
Tip_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv <-  cbind(Tip_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv, Tip_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv)
Tip_actin_list <- Tip_actin_list[-117]
```

# Actin intensity at neurite shaft (neurite length - 70 pixels)
```{r}

Neurite_actin_list<- list()

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(subfolder_list))  
{
  csv_list <- list.files(subfolder_list[n],pattern = "^Actin_neurite(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  df <- do.call("cbind", lapply(csv_list, read.csv, header = TRUE))
  
  df <-df[, grep("Integerated.intensity",  colnames(df)), drop = FALSE] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- mapply(`*`,df, 1/10000)
  #df <-pracma::hampel(df, k=5)$y # remove jumping spikes
  colnames(df)<- paste("Neurite_actin", seq( from = 1, to = dim(df)[2] ),  sep = ".")
  
  Neurite_actin_list[[n]]<- df
 
}

names(Neurite_actin_list) <- gsub("Kymo_", "", subfolder_name_list)
```

# WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv and WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv are of the same neuron
```{r}
colnames(Neurite_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv) <- c("Neurite_actin.7", "Neurite_actin.8")
Neurite_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv <-  cbind(Neurite_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv, Neurite_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv)
Neurite_actin_list <- Neurite_actin_list[-117]
```

# Actin density of the whole neurite ((tip + neurite shaft)/neurite length))
```{r}
Density_actin_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(length_list))  {

  df <- (Neurite_actin_list[[n]])/(length_list[[n]])
  colnames(df)<- paste("density_actin", seq( from = 1, to = ncol(df) ),  sep = ".")
  df[sapply(df, is.infinite)] <- NA
  Density_actin_list[[n]]<- df
  
}

names(Density_actin_list) <- names(length_list)
```

# WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv and WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv are of the same neuron
```{r}
colnames(Density_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv) <- c("density_actin.7", "density_actin.8")
Density_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv <-  cbind(Density_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_07_R3D.dv, Density_actin_list$WT_DIV4_LAmScar_01Ctl_23paBlebb02_06_R3D.dv)
Density_actin_list <- Density_actin_list[-117]
```

```{r}
all_list <- list(length = length_list, 
                 tip_actin = Tip_actin_list,  
                 neurite_actin = Neurite_actin_list, 
                 Density_actin = Density_actin_list)
```
##############################################################################################################################################################################################################
## subgroup into axon and minor neuirtes based on length threshold

# We defined the neuirte with initial neurite length > 100 um as axon
```{r}
axon_thre <- 50
```

```{r}

length_50_list <- list()
tip_actin_50_list <- list()
neurite_actin_50_list <- list()
density_actin_50_list <- list()

selected_list <- length_list 

for (n in 1:length(selected_list)){
  
 df <- length_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 selected_columns <- names(df)[df[1, ] < axon_thre] # change the criteria: initial length >50 for axon and <50 for minor neurites
 length_50_list[[n]] <- df[,..selected_columns]
 
 df <- Tip_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Tip_actin",  selected_columns)
 tip_actin_50_list [[n]] <- df[, ..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Neurite_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Neurite_actin",  selected_columns)
 neurite_actin_50_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Density_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "density_actin",  selected_columns)
 density_actin_50_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
}
 
names(length_50_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(tip_actin_50_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(neurite_actin_50_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(density_actin_50_list) <- names(length_list) 
```

```{r}
length_50_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> length_50_list
tip_actin_50_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> tip_actin_50_list
neurite_actin_50_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> neurite_actin_50_list
density_actin_50_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> density_actin_50_list

all_50_list <- list(length = length_50_list, 
                 tip_actin = tip_actin_50_list,  
                 neurite_actin = neurite_actin_50_list, 
                 Density_actin = density_actin_50_list)
```

# Data of minor neurites
```{r}
length_minor_list <- list()
tip_actin_minor_list <- list()
neurite_actin_minor_list <- list()
density_actin_minor_list <- list()

selected_list <- length_list 

for (n in 1:length(selected_list)){
  
 df <- length_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 selected_columns <- names(df)[df[1, ] < axon_thre] 
 length_minor_list[[n]] <- df[,..selected_columns]
 
 df <- Tip_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Tip_actin",  selected_columns)
 tip_actin_minor_list [[n]] <- df[, ..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Neurite_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Neurite_actin",  selected_columns)
 neurite_actin_minor_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Density_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "density_actin",  selected_columns)
 density_actin_minor_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
}
 
names(length_minor_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(tip_actin_minor_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(neurite_actin_minor_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(density_actin_minor_list) <- names(length_list) 

# remove cells without minor neuirtes
length_minor_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> length_minor_list
tip_actin_minor_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> tip_actin_minor_list
neurite_actin_minor_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> neurite_actin_minor_list
density_actin_minor_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> density_actin_minor_list

all_minor_list <- list(length = length_minor_list, 
                 tip_actin = tip_actin_minor_list,  
                 neurite_actin = neurite_actin_minor_list, 
                 Density_actin = density_actin_minor_list)
```

# Data of axon
```{r}

length_axon_list <- list()
tip_actin_axon_list <- list()
neurite_actin_axon_list <- list()
density_actin_axon_list <- list()

selected_list <- length_list 

for (n in 1:length(selected_list)){
  
 df <- length_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 selected_columns <- names(df)[df[1, ] > axon_thre] 
 length_axon_list[[n]] <- df[,..selected_columns]
 
 df <- Tip_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Tip_actin",  selected_columns)
 tip_actin_axon_list [[n]] <- df[, ..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Neurite_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "Neurite_actin",  selected_columns)
 neurite_actin_axon_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
 
 df <- Density_actin_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
 modified_vector <- gsub("Length", "density_actin",  selected_columns)
 density_actin_axon_list[[n]] <- df[,..modified_vector]
}
 
names(length_axon_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(tip_actin_axon_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(neurite_actin_axon_list) <- names(length_list) 
names(density_actin_axon_list) <- names(length_list) 

# remove cells without minor neuirtes
length_axon_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> length_axon_list
tip_actin_axon_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> tip_actin_axon_list
neurite_actin_axon_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> neurite_actin_axon_list
density_actin_axon_list %>% discard(~ nrow(.x) == 0) -> density_actin_axon_list

all_axon_list <- list(length = length_axon_list, 
                 tip_actin = tip_actin_axon_list,  
                 neurite_actin = neurite_actin_axon_list, 
                 Density_actin = density_actin_axon_list)
```

# Soma actin (for analysis at whole-cell level)
```{r}
subfolder_list <- list.dirs(path =Path_1, full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
soma_list  <- subfolder_list [ grepl("soma", subfolder_list) ]
somaActin_list<- list()

freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)

# read csv files in the subfolders of subfolder list
for (n in 1:length(soma_list))  
{
  csv_list <- list.files(soma_list[n],pattern = "^soma_actin*(.*)csv$", 
                     recursive = F,  #list of subfolders and files within the subfolders
                     include.dirs = F, # Should subdirectory names be included 
                     full.name = TRUE)  #get the full name (path and file name) of each file
  
  somaActin_list[[n]]  <- do.call("cbind", lapply(csv_list, read.csv, header = TRUE)) %>% as.data.table()
}

soma_actin <- do.call("cbind", somaActin_list) %>% as.data.table()
```

# Create stationary (differential) curve of all measurements (axon + minor neurites)
# (raw data -> MA smoothing -> differencing -> MA smoothing)
```{r}
all_sta_list <- list()
freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)

for (m in 1:length(all_list)) {
  
  selected_list <- all_list[[m]]
  sta_list <- list()

  for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  {
 
  sta_list[[n]]<- selected_list[[n]] %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>%                                    # smoothing #1
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(3) %>% 
    ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1))
  
  colnames(sta_list[[n]])<-colnames(selected_list[[n]])
  
  }
names(sta_list)<- names(selected_list)
all_sta_list[[m]]<- sta_list
}

names(all_sta_list)<- names(all_list )
```

# Prepare data for cross-correlation analysis at individual neurite level (axon + minor neurites)
```{r}

library("data.table")

all_sta_cell_list <- list()

for (k in 1:length(length_list)){
  
neurite_list <- list()

dt1 <- all_sta_list[[1]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()
NC <- dt1 %>% ncol()

    for (n in 1:NC){
      
     dt <- dt1[,..n]
     
          for (m in 2:4){
            
            dt2 <- all_sta_list[[m]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()
            dt<- cbind(dt, dt2[, ..n])
              
          }
    
    neurite_list[[n]] <- dt
    
    }

names(neurite_list)<- paste("Neurite_", 1:NC, sep = "")

all_sta_cell_list[[k]]<- neurite_list

}

names(all_sta_cell_list) <- names(all_sta_list[[1]])

```

# Create stationary (differential) curve of all measurements (axon)
# (raw data -> MA smoothing -> differencing -> MA smoothing)
```{r}
all_axon_sta_list <- list()

freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)

for (m in 1:length(all_axon_list)) {
  
  selected_list <- all_axon_list[[m]]

  sta_list <- list()

  for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  {
 
  sta <- selected_list[[n]] %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>%                                    # smoothing #1
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(3) %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
    colnames(sta) <- colnames(selected_list[[n]])
   sta_list [[n]] <- sta   %>%  ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1))
  
  }

names(sta_list)<- names(selected_list)
  
all_axon_sta_list[[m]]<- sta_list
  
}

names(all_axon_sta_list)<- names(all_list )
```

```{r}
# Prepare data for cross-correlation analysis at individual neurite level 

all_axon_sta_cell_list <- list()

for (k in 1:length(length_axon_list)){
  
neurite_list <- list()
dt1 <- all_axon_sta_list[[1]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()

    for (n in 1:ncol(dt1)){
      
     dt <- dt1[,..n]
          for (m in 2:4){
            
            dt2 <- all_axon_sta_list[[m]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()
            dt<- cbind(dt, dt2[, ..n])
          }
    
    neurite_list[[n]] <- dt
    }

names(neurite_list)<- paste("Neurite_", 1:ncol(dt1), sep = "")
all_axon_sta_cell_list[[k]]<- neurite_list

}
names(all_axon_sta_cell_list) <- names(all_axon_sta_list[[1]])
```

# Create stationary (differential) curve of all measurements (minor neurites)
```{r}
all_minor_sta_list <- list()

freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)

for (m in 1:length(all_minor_list)) {
  
  selected_list <- all_minor_list[[m]]

  sta_list <- list()

  for (n in 1:length(selected_list))  {
 
  sta <- selected_list[[n]] %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>%                                    # smoothing #1
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(3) %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  
    colnames(sta) <- colnames(selected_list[[n]])
   sta_list [[n]] <- sta   %>%  ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1))
  
  }

names(sta_list)<- names(selected_list)
  
all_minor_sta_list[[m]]<- sta_list
  
}

names(all_minor_sta_list)<- names(all_list )

```

```{r}
# Prepare data for cross-correlation analysis at individual neurite level (for length filtered)

all_minor_sta_cell_list <- list()

for (k in 1:length(length_minor_list)){
  
neurite_list <- list()
dt1 <- all_minor_sta_list[[1]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()

    for (n in 1:ncol(dt1)){
      
     dt <- dt1[,..n]
          for (m in 2:4){
            
            dt2 <- all_minor_sta_list[[m]][[k]] %>% as.data.table()
            dt<- cbind(dt, dt2[, ..n])
          }
    
    neurite_list[[n]] <- dt
    }

names(neurite_list)<- paste("Neurite_", 1:ncol(dt1), sep = "")
all_minor_sta_cell_list[[k]]<- neurite_list

}
names(all_minor_sta_cell_list) <- names(all_minor_sta_list[[1]])
```

# subset the time series (for inpection)
```{r}

for (m in 1:length(all_sta_list)) {
  
  selected_list <- all_sta_list[[m]]
  
  for (n in 1:length(selected_list)){
    
   selected_list[[n]] <- selected_list[[n]][1:150, ]
  }
  
  all_sta_list[[m]] <- selected_list
}

names(all_sta_list)<- names(all_list )

```

# cross-correlation with neurite length at individual neurite level
```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_neurite_length_list <- list()
selected_list <- all_50_sta_cell_list # all_sta_cell_list or all_50_sta_cell_list
selected_list <- unlist(selected_list, recursive=FALSE)

for (n in 2:4){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][ ,1],  
                      selected_list[[1]][ ,..n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                            plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][ ,1],  
                      selected_list[[m]][ ,..n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,
                            plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)
  ccf_neurite_length_list[[n-1]] <- ccf
}

names(ccf_neurite_length_list)<- c("Tip_actin",  "Neurite_actin",  "density_actin")

```

# select the corr for summarization and plotting graph. 
```{r}
selected_ccf <- ccf_neurite_length_list$Tip_actin
selected_ccf <- selected_ccf[ ,grep('DIV4', names(selected_ccf )) ] %>% as.data.table() # DIV3 or DIV4
selected_ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)/freq
stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf %>% gather(Neurite, ccf, -lag) # select which CCF of measurements to show
df_summary <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% group_by(lag) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(ccf)
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "shaft_actin_DIV3_shorter50.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```
# We separate the outrgwoth and retraction events first, sum the changes of all neurites, and then do smoothening. 
# all_sta_list (raw data -> MA smoothing -> differencing -> MA smoothing) -> (separate -> sum -> smoothening)
```{r}
selected_list <- all_sta_list # all_sta_list or all_minor_sta_list

thres= 0.0 # change threshold here

all_sta_PN_list <- list()

for (k in 1:length(selected_list )){  
  
  list_1 <- selected_list [[k]]
  sta_PN_list <- list()
  
  for (m in 1:length(list_1)) {
    
    DT <- list_1[[m]] %>% as.data.frame()
   
    DT_pos<- DT
    DT_neg<- DT
  
    for (n in 1:dim(DT)[2]){
        DT_pos[, n][DT_pos[, n] < 0] <- 0 
        DT_neg[, n][DT_neg[, n] > 0] <- 0 
    }
    
    mat_sum <- data.frame(rowSums(DT_pos), -rowSums(DT_neg)) # add neg sign
    
   # mat_sum [, 1][mat_sum [, 1] < thres] <- 0 
   # mat_sum [, 2][mat_sum [, 2] > -thres] <- 0
    
    mat_sum <- mat_sum %>% forecast::ma(5)                    # smoothing #2
  
    colnames(mat_sum)<- c(paste("Pos_", names(all_list)[k], sep = ""), paste("Neg_", names(all_list)[k], sep = "")) # create column names
    sta_PN_list[[m]] <- mat_sum
  
  }
  
  names(sta_PN_list)<-  names(list_1)
  all_sta_PN_list[[k]]<- sta_PN_list
  
}

names(all_sta_PN_list)<- names(all_list )
```

# Combine all stationary PN data of each videos, and add stationary soma data
```{r}
comb_sta_list<- list()

k <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]]%>% length()

for (m in 1:k){
  
  mat <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]][m] %>% as.data.frame()
  colnames(mat)<- sub('.*\\.', '', colnames(mat))
  
  for (n in 2:length(all_sta_PN_list)){
    
    mat2 <- all_sta_PN_list[[n]][m] %>% as.data.table()
    colnames(mat2)<- sub('.*\\.', '', colnames(mat2))
    
    mat <- data.frame(mat, mat2)
  }
  
  Dim <- mat %>% nrow()
  NM <- all_sta_PN_list[[1]][m] %>% names()# retrive the cell name
  mat3 <- mts_stationary_list[[NM]][1:Dim, c(2, 3)] %>% as.data.table() # soma data
  mat <- data.frame(mat, mat3)
  
 comb_sta_list[[m]]<- mat %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 

}

names(comb_sta_list)<-   all_sta_PN_list[[1]] %>% names()
```

# cross-correlation of stationary PN (summed positive and summed negative) data

```{r warning=FALSE}
selected_list <- comb_sta_list

ccf_PN_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = length(all_list)+1)

names(ccf_PN_list)<- c(names(all_list), "soma")

for (n in 1:5){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,(n*2-1)],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,(n*2)], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,(n*2-1)],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,(n*2)], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
                            
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)
  ccf_PN_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

# cross-correlation with stationary Pos_length data
```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_Poslen_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = dim(selected_list[[1]])[2]-2)

names(ccf_Poslen_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])[-c(1,2)] 

for (n in 3:10){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,c("Pos_length")],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,c("Pos_length")],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)
  ccf_Poslen_list[[n-2]] <- ccf
}
```

# cross-correlation with stationary Neg_length data
```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_Neglen_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = dim(selected_list[[1]])[2]-2)

names(ccf_Neglen_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])[-c(1,2)] 

for (n in 3:10){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (selected_list[[1]][,c("Neg_length")],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (selected_list[[m]][,c("Neg_length")],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=50) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-50:50) # corresponds to "lag.max=50" set in ccf
  ccf_Neglen_list[[n-2]] <- ccf
}
```

# cross-correlation with soma actin
```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_Actsoma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = 8)
names(ccf_Actsoma_list)<- c(paste("Pos_", c("length", "tip_actin", "neurite_actin", "Density_actin"), sep=""), paste("Neg_", c("length","tip_actin", "neurite_actin", "Density_actin"), sep=""))

for (n in 1:8){
  
  df1 <- selected_list[[1]][ ,"soma_actin"]
  df2 <- selected_list[[1]][,grep(names(ccf_Actsoma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))] 
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf (df1,  
                      df2, 
                      type = "correlation", 
                      na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                      lag.max=50) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
     df1 <- selected_list[[m]][ ,"soma_actin"]
     df2 <- selected_list[[m]][,grep(names(ccf_Actsoma_list)[n],  colnames(selected_list[[n]]))]  
  
      ccfPlot_2 <- ccf (df1,  
                          df2, 
                          type = "correlation", 
                          na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                          lag.max=50) 
      
      ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
      
      ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)
  ccf_Actsoma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
ccf_all_list<-list(PN=ccf_PN_list, Poslen=ccf_Poslen_list, Neglen=ccf_Neglen_list, somaActin=ccf_Actsoma_list)
```

```{r}
selected_ccf <- ccf_all_list$PN$length

selected_ccf <-  selected_ccf [ , grep('DIV3', colnames(selected_ccf)) ]  %>% as.data.table()  # filter for DIV3 or DIV4 neuron only
  
selected_ccf$lag<- c(-50:50)/freq

stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf %>% gather(Neurite, ccf, -lag) # select which CCF of measurements to show

df_summary <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% group_by(lag) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(ccf)
```

```{r}
selected_ccf %>% write_csv("DIV3_ext_ret_corr.csv")
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "PosNeg_velocity_corr_DIV4_minor_MA5.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```
# analysis at whole-cell level
# Create time-series data of total neurite length, and actin intensity/density at neurite tip, shaft, and soma. 
```{r}
mts_list<- list()
mts_avg_list <- list()
mts_stationary_list <- list()

freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)
pixel <- 0.1625 # set pixel size

for (n in 1:length(length_list))  {
 
  mat <- length_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() %>% as.data.table() # total neurite length
  colnames(mat) <- "sum_length"
  
  # get soma intensity
  ColName <- names(Tip_actin_list)[n]

  Dim <- nrow(Tip_actin_list[[n]])
  mat$soma_actin <- soma_actin[1:Dim, ..ColName ] 
  
  mat$sum_tip_actin <- Tip_actin_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  mat$sum_actin <-  Neurite_actin_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() # total actin intensity at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_neurite_actin <- (Neurite_actin_list[[n]] - Tip_actin_list[[n]]) %>% rowSums() 
  mat$sum_actin_density <- mat$sum_actin/mat$sum_length # actin density at the whole neurite

  mts_list[[n]]<- mat %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  mts_avg_list[[n]] <- mts_list[[n]] %>% forecast::ma(5) %>% as.ts() # Moving Average #1
  colnames(mts_avg_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_list[[n]])
  
  mts_stationary_list[[n]] <- mts_avg_list[[n]] %>% 
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>%                                             # Moving Average #2
    ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  colnames(mts_stationary_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_list[[n]])
  
}

names(mts_list)<- names(Tip_actin_list)
names(mts_avg_list)<- names(Tip_actin_list)
names(mts_stationary_list)<- names(Tip_actin_list)
```

# Create time-series data of total minor neurite length (<100 um at beginning), and actin intensity/density at neurite tip, shaft, and soma. 
```{r}
mts_50_list<- list()
mts_50_avg_list <- list()
mts_50_stationary_list <- list()

freq <- 0.5 # set frequency (1/interval)
pixel <- 0.1625 # set pixel size

for (n in 1:length(length_50_list))  {
 
  mat <- length_50_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() %>% as.data.table() # total neurite length
  colnames(mat) <- "sum_length"
  
  # get soma intensity
  ColName <- names(tip_actin_50_list)[n]

  Dim <- nrow(tip_actin_50_list[[n]])
  mat$soma_actin <- soma_actin[1:Dim, ..ColName ] 
  
  mat$sum_tip_actin<- tip_actin_50_list[[n]] %>% rowSums()
  mat$sum_actin <-  neurite_actin_50_list[[n]] %>% rowSums() # total actin intensity at the whole neurite
  mat$sum_neurite_actin <- (neurite_actin_50_list[[n]] - tip_actin_50_list[[n]]) %>% rowSums() 
  mat$sum_actin_density <- mat$sum_neurite_actin/mat$sum_length # actin density at the whole neurite

  mts_50_list[[n]]<- mat %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  mts_50_avg_list[[n]] <- mts_50_list[[n]] %>% forecast::ma(5) %>% as.ts() # Moving Average #1
  colnames(mts_50_avg_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_50_list[[n]])
  
  mts_50_stationary_list[[n]] <- mts_50_avg_list[[n]] %>% 
    MTS::diffM(d=1) %>% 
    forecast::ma(5) %>%                                             # Moving Average #2
    ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
  
  colnames(mts_50_stationary_list[[n]])<-colnames(mts_50_list[[n]])
  
}

names(mts_50_list)<- names(tip_actin_50_list)
names(mts_50_avg_list)<- names(tip_actin_50_list)
names(mts_50_stationary_list)<- names(tip_actin_50_list)
```

## We smoothen the stationary profiles first, separete outrgwoth and retraction events, and sum the changes of all neurites. (raw data -> smoothing -> differencing -> smmothing -> separate -> sum)
```{r warning=FALSE}

# Smoothen the stationary (diff) profiles and optionally filter out small length change with threshold

selected_list <- all_sta_list$length 

mts_stationary_pos_list <- list()
mts_stationary_neg_list <- list()
thres= 0.0 # change threshold here

# Positive peaks only (outgrowth event)
for (m in 1:length(selected_list)) {
  selected_data <- grep(paste(c("Length"),collapse="|"),  colnames(selected_list[[m]]))
  length_mat<- selected_list[[m]][, selected_data ]
  
  length_mat_avg<- length_mat %>% forecast::ma(3) %>% as.ts() # smoothening 1
  colnames(length_mat_avg)<-colnames(length_mat)

  mts_dim<- dim(length_mat_avg)
    for (n in 1:mts_dim[2]){
      length_mat_avg[, n][length_mat_avg[ , colnames(length_mat_avg)[n]] < thres] <- 0 
    }
  
  length_mat_avg <- length_mat_avg %>% as.data.frame() 
  length_mat_avg$sum <- length_mat_avg  %>% rowSums()  # We sum up the extent of outgrowth at each time point
  mts_stationary_pos_list[[m]] <- length_mat_avg %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 

}

# Negative peaks only (retraction event)
for (m in 1:length(selected_list)) {
  selected_data <- grep(paste(c("Length"),collapse="|"),  colnames(selected_list[[m]]))
  length_mat<- selected_list[[m]][, selected_data ]
  length_mat_avg<- length_mat %>% forecast::ma(3) %>% as.ts() # smoothening 1
  colnames(length_mat_avg)<-colnames(length_mat)
  
  mts_dim<- dim(length_mat_avg)
    for (n in 1:mts_dim[2]){
      length_mat_avg[, n][length_mat_avg[ , colnames(length_mat_avg)[n]] > - thres] <- 0 
    }
  length_mat_avg <- length_mat_avg %>% as.data.frame() 
  length_mat_avg$sum <- length_mat_avg  %>% rowSums()  # We sum up the extent of retraction at each time point
  mts_stationary_neg_list[[m]] <- length_mat_avg %>% ts(frequency = freq, start = c(0, 1)) 
}

```
## extension and retraction lifetime (duration)
# Extension duration
```{r}
thres <- 0.00

list_1 <- list()

for (m in 1:length(mts_stationary_pos_list)){
  
  df <- mts_stationary_pos_list[[m]] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- df[, !"sum"] %>% as.data.frame()
  df<- df[, (colSums(df, na.rm = T)> 0)] %>% as.data.table()
  
  list_2 <-  list()
  
   for (n in 1: ncol(df)){
    
    df2 <- df[ ,..n]
    df2$time <- seq(0, (nrow(df2)-1), 1)
    df2 <- df2[complete.cases(df2), ] 
    
    df2$inside <- df2[ , 1] > thres
    df2$start  <- ! c(FALSE, df2$inside[-nrow(df2)]) & df2$inside
    df2$end    <- df2$inside & ! c(df2$inside[-1], FALSE)  # Not used
    df2 <- df2[ df2$inside, ]
    df2$group  <- cumsum(df2$start)  # Number the spells
    colnames(df2)[1] <- "velocity"
    
    df3 <- plyr::ddply( df2, "group", summarize,
                        start  = min(time),
                        end    = max(time),
                        length = length(velocity),
                        mean   = mean(velocity))
   
    df3$neurite <- names(df)[n]
    df3$neurite_length <- length_list[[m]][1,n] 
    list_2[[n]] <- df3

   }
  
  df3<- list_2 %>% data.table::rbindlist()
  df3$cell<- names(mts_stationary_list)[m]
  df3$growth<- "extension"

  list_1[[m]] <- df3

}

extension_duration_df <- list_1 %>% data.table::rbindlist()

```

# Retraction duration
```{r}

list_1 <- list()
for (m in 1:length(mts_stationary_neg_list)){
  
  df <- mts_stationary_neg_list[[m]] %>% as.data.table()
  df <- df[, !"sum"] %>% as.data.frame()
  df<- df[, (colSums(df, na.rm = T)< 0)] %>% as.data.table()
  list_2 <-  list()
  
   for (n in 1: ncol(df)){
     
    df2 <- df[ ,..n]
    df2$time <- seq(0, (nrow(df2)-1), 1)
    df2 <- df2[complete.cases(df2), ] 
    
    df2$inside <- df2[ , 1] < -thres
    df2$start  <- ! c(FALSE, df2$inside[-nrow(df2)]) & df2$inside
    df2$end    <- df2$inside & ! c(df2$inside[-1], FALSE)  # Not used
    df2 <- df2[ df2$inside, ]
    df2$group  <- cumsum(df2$start)  # Number the spells
    colnames(df2)[1] <- "velocity"
    
    df3 <- plyr::ddply( df2, "group", summarize,
                        start  = min(time),
                        end    = max(time),
                        length = length(velocity),
                        mean   = mean(velocity))
   
    df3$neurite <- names(df)[n]
    df3$neurite_length <- length_list[[m]][1,n] # add the initial reunite length for later filtering for axon and minor neuirtes
    list_2[[n]] <- df3

   }
  
  df3<- list_2 %>% data.table::rbindlist()
  
  # add sample labeling
  df3$cell<- names(mts_stationary_list)[m]
  df3$growth<- "retraction"

  list_1[[m]] <- df3

}

retraction_duration_df <- list_1 %>% data.table::rbindlist()

```

```{r}
duration_df <- rbind(extension_duration_df , retraction_duration_df )
duration_df$length <- duration_df$length/freq
duration_df$axon_minor <-  "minor"
duration_df[neurite_length >100 ]$axon_minor <-  "axon"
duration_df$DIV <- "DIV3"
duration_df[grep('DIV4', duration_df$cell) ]$DIV <- "DIV4"
```

# Data points at cell level
```{r}
df_summary_duration <-duration_df %>% 
 group_by(cell, DIV, growth, axon_minor) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(length) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
# add sample labeling for grouping and batch control
df_summary_duration$ID<- paste (df_summary_duration$cell, df_summary_duration$DIV, df_summary_duration$axon_minor, df_summary_duration$growth,  sep = "_")

df_summary_duration$group<- paste (df_summary_duration$axon_minor, df_summary_duration$growth, sep = "_")
```

# label batch of data 
```{r}
df_summary_duration$batch<- "_"
df_summary_duration[grep("170522", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170522"
df_summary_duration[grep("170724", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170724"
df_summary_duration[grep("170814", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170814"
df_summary_duration[grep("170821", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170821"
df_summary_duration[grep("170812", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170812"
df_summary_duration[grep("170515", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "170515"
df_summary_duration[grep("151209", df_summary_duration$cell), ]$batch <- "151209"

df_summary_duration <- df_summary_duration[cond != "CytoD_WT"] #& batch !="151209"
```

```{r}
outliers <- df_summary_duration %>% 
  group_by(axon_minor, growth, DIV) %>% 
 rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 

df_summary_duration<- df_summary_duration[! (ID %in% outliers$ID)]

```

```{r}
duration_df %>% group_by(cell, cond, growth, neurite) %>% dplyr::summarise(n = n())
```

# generate pairwise comparison list
```{r}
my_comparisons <- df_summary_duration$group %>% unique() %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 

my_comparisons <- list(c("axon_extension",  "minor_extension"), c("axon_retraction",  "minor_retraction"), c("axon_extension",  "axon_retraction"), c("minor_extension",  "minor_retraction"))
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_duration[DIV=="DIV3"] %>%  mutate(group = fct_relevel(group, "axon_extension",  "minor_extension", "axon_retraction",  "minor_retraction")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=mean, fill =axon_minor) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
 geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1), size= 1)+ #aes(color = batch)
  
  # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
  # geom_point() +
 # geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.5)+
    
 scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(4, 50), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     #label.y = c(7, 7.5, 8, 8.5, 9, 9.5, 10, 10.5), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold", angle = 90)) #for centering the text 
```
```{r}
df_summary_duration[DIV=="DIV3"] %>% group_by(axon_minor, growth) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(mean) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
df_summary_duration[DIV=="DIV3"] %>% write_csv("DIV3_ext_ret_duration.csv")
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "ext_ret_duration_thres_0_DIV4.pdf",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "pdf")
```

# extension and retraction velocity
```{r}
Ext_velocity_WT <- list()
Ret_velocity_WT <- list()

for (m in 1:length(mts_stationary_pos_list)){
  
df <- mts_stationary_pos_list[[m]] %>% as.data.frame()
df [ df == 0 ] <- NA
df1 <- colMeans(df, na.rm = T)  %>% as.data.frame() # calculate the average velocity through the observation window. Or matrixStats::colMedians
colnames(df1) <- "mean_vel"
df1$median_vel <- df %>% as.matrix() %>% matrixStats::colMedians(na.rm = T)  # calculate the average velocity through the observation window. Or matrixStats::colMedians

df1$cond <- "WT"
df1$cell <- names(mts_list)[m] %>% basename() 
df1$neurite <- rownames(df1)
df1 <- df1 %>% subset (df1$neurite !="sum")
df1$length <- length_list[[m]][1,] # add the neurite length at the first time point for later axon-minor neurite separation
Ext_velocity_WT [[m]] <- df1 %>% as.data.table()

df <- mts_stationary_neg_list[[m]] %>% as.data.frame()
df[ df == 0 ] <- NA
df2 <- colMeans(df, na.rm = T)  %>% as.data.frame() %>% abs() # calculate the average velocity through the observation window
colnames(df2) <- "mean_vel"
df2$median_vel <- df %>% as.matrix() %>% matrixStats::colMedians(na.rm = T) %>% abs()

df2$cond <- "WT"
df2$cell <- names(mts_list)[m] %>% basename() 
df2$neurite <- rownames(df2)
df2 <- df2 %>% subset (df2$neurite !="sum")
df2$length <- length_list[[m]][1,]
Ret_velocity_WT [[m]] <- df2 %>% as.data.table()
  
}
```

```{r}
Ext_velocity_WT_df <- Ext_velocity_WT %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame()
Ext_velocity_WT_df$Growth <- "Extension"
Ret_velocity_WT_df <- Ret_velocity_WT %>% reduce(bind_rows)  %>% as.data.frame()
Ret_velocity_WT_df$Growth <- "Retraction"

velocity_comb_df<- rbind(Ext_velocity_WT_df, Ret_velocity_WT_df) %>% as.data.table()

#names(velocity_comb_df)[1]<- "Velocity"

#saveRDS(velocity_comb_df, "velocity_comb_df")
```

```{r}
velocity_comb_df[Growth=="Extension"] %>% ggplot(aes(x=median_vel, y=length) ) +
  scale_x_continuous( expand = c(0, 0),  limits = c(-0.1, 2),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5)) +
  geom_point()
```

# define axon vs minor neurite based on length
```{r}

velocity_comb_df$axon_minor<- "minor"
velocity_comb_df[length >100]$axon_minor<- "axon"

velocity_comb_df_axon <- velocity_comb_df
velocity_comb_df_minor <- velocity_comb_df[length <100]
```

# Data points at cell level
```{r}
df_summary_velocity <- velocity_comb_df %>% group_by(cell, Growth, axon_minor) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(median_vel, mean_vel) %>% as.data.table()

df_summary_velocity$DIV <- "DIV3"
df_summary_velocity[grep('DIV4', df_summary_velocity$cell) ]$DIV <- "DIV4"
df_summary_velocity$group <- paste(df_summary_velocity$axon_minor, df_summary_velocity$Growth, sep = "_")
```

# (optional) remove outliers
```{r}
outliers <-  df_summary_velocity[variable == "mean_vel"] %>% group_by(group, DIV) %>% rstatix::identify_outliers(mean) 
df_summary_velocity_2 <- df_summary_velocity[ !(cell %in% outliers$cell)]
```

```{r}

df <-df_summary_velocity$group %>% table() %>% as.data.frame()
my_comparisons <- df$. %>% as.character() %>% combn(2, simplify = FALSE) 
```

```{r message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
# my_comparisons <- list(c("axon", "minor"))
#pj <- position_jitter(seed = 1, width = .1, height = 0)

df_summary_velocity_2[DIV=="DIV3" & variable == "mean_vel"] %>%  mutate(group = fct_relevel(group, "axon_Extension",  "minor_Extension", "axon_Retraction",  "minor_Retraction")) %>% 
  
ggplot ( aes(x=group, y=mean, fill =axon_minor) )+ 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette="Dark2") + 
  theme_classic()+
geom_violin(aes(), trim=F,  kernel ="gaussian", adjust=1)  +
 geom_boxplot(aes(), width=0.2, outlier.colour = NA, fill="white")+ 
 geom_jitter(aes(), shape=16, position=position_jitter(0.1), size= 1)+ #aes(color = batch)
  
  # geom_line(aes(group = Image))+
  # geom_point() +
 # geom_path(aes(group = cell),alpha = 0.5)+
    
# scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(4, 50), breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 5))+ 
# geom_signif(comparisons = my_comparisons ,test = "wilcox.test",  color="black")+
 stat_compare_means(comparisons = my_comparisons, paired=F, method="wilcox.test", 
                     #label.y = c(7, 7.5, 8, 8.5, 9, 9.5, 10, 10.5), 
                     label = "{p.adj.format}{p.adj.signif}") +
  
  theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T) +
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "right",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text 
```

```{r}
df_summary_velocity_2[DIV=="DIV3" & variable == "median_vel"]  %>% group_by(axon_minor, Growth) %>% 
  rstatix::get_summary_stats(mean) %>% as.data.table()
```

```{r}
df_summary_velocity_2[DIV=="DIV3" & variable == "median_vel"] %>% write_csv("DIV3_ext_ret_velocity.csv")
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "Axon_minor_velocities_DIV3.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

# cross-correlation with sum neurite length
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- mts_50_stationary_list # mts_stationary_list or mts_50_stationary_list

ccf_sum_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]])-1)

names(ccf_sum_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])[-1]

for (n in 2:6){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf(selected_list[[1]][,1],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=80) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf(selected_list[[m]][,1],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=80) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-80:80)
  ccf_sum_list[[n-1]] <- ccf
}
```

# cross-correlation with soma actin
```{r warning=FALSE}

selected_list <- mts_50_stationary_list # mts_stationary_list or mts_50_stationary_list

ccf_sumActsoma_list<- vector(mode = "list", length = ncol(selected_list[[1]]))

names(ccf_sumActsoma_list)<- colnames(selected_list[[1]])

for (n in 1:6){
  
    ccfPlot <- ccf(selected_list[[1]][,2],  
                            selected_list[[1]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=80) 
    
    ccf <- ccfPlot[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  for (m in 2:length(selected_list)) {
  
  ccfPlot_2 <- ccf(selected_list[[m]][,2],  
                            selected_list[[m]][,n], 
                            type = "correlation", 
                            na.action = na.pass,  plot=F, 
                            lag.max=80) 
  
  ccf_2 <- ccfPlot_2[["acf"]] %>% as.data.frame()
  
  ccf <- cbind(ccf, ccf_2)
  
  }
    
  colnames(ccf)<- names(selected_list)
  ccf$lag<- c(-80:80)
  ccf_sumActsoma_list[[n]] <- ccf
}
```

```{r}
ccf_sum_all_list<-list(sumlength=ccf_sum_list,  somaActin=ccf_sumActsoma_list)

```

```{r}
selected_ccf <- ccf_sum_all_list$sumlength$soma_actin
selected_ccf <- selected_ccf[ ,grep('DIV4', names(selected_ccf )) ] %>% as.data.table() # DIV3 or DIV4
selected_ccf$lag<- c(-80:80)/freq
stacked_ccf_mat <- selected_ccf %>% gather(Neurite, ccf, -lag) 
df_summary <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% group_by(lag) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(ccf, type = "common")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=lag, y=mean)) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="lightgrey")+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
   stat_peaks(colour = "red", span = 15, ignore_threshold = 0.5) +
  stat_peaks(geom = "text", colour = "red", span = 15, ignore_threshold = 0.6, hjust = 2, angle = 0) +
  stat_valleys(colour = "lightblue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9) +
 stat_valleys(geom = "text", colour = "blue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9, hjust = -0.5, angle = 0) +
  
   theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
   geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
   scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(-0.5 ,0.5),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6))+
   scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r}
ggsave(
  "growth_SomaActin_corr_DIV4.eps",
  plot = last_plot(),
  device = "eps")
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}
fig_A <- stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=lag, y=ccf)) + geom_point(alpha=0.3, size=0.5) +
   geom_line(aes(color=Cell), size=0.8)+ theme(legend.position = "none") 

fig_B <-stacked_ccf_mat %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = lag, y = ccf, fill=Cell)) +
    geom_area(alpha=0.5 , size=.5, colour="grey") +
    scale_fill_viridis(discrete = T) +  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
    theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ theme(legend.position = "none") 

fig_C <-ggplot(df_summary, aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=0.8) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="blue", alpha=0.2)

ggpubr::ggarrange(fig_A,fig_B,fig_C,
                  labels = LETTERS[1:3],
                  ncol = 2, nrow = 2,  legend="none")

```

# filter for neurons showing stage_2-stage_3 transition
```{r}
library(matrixStats)

length_list_2 <- length_list %>% map(as.data.table)

# remove cells with max neurite length < 50 um
length_list_2 <- length_list_2 %>% discard (function(x) max(x)<70)

# remove cells with neurite number < 3
length_list_2 <- length_list_2 %>% discard (function(x) ncol(x)<3)  

testFunc <- function(x) x %>% as.matrix() %>% Rfast::nth(2, descending = T)
polarity_list<- list()

for (n in 1:length(length_list_2)){
  
  df <- length_list_2[[n]] 
  max <- apply(df, 1, max)
  max_2nd <-  apply(df, 1, function(x) testFunc(x))

  df$max <- max
  df$max_2nd <- max_2nd
  df$polarity <- max/max_2nd
  df$Cell <- names(length_list_2)[n]
  df$Time <- seq( from = 0, to =  (nrow(df)-1) ) *1/freq
  polarity_list [[n]] <- df
}

names(polarity_list)<- names(length_list_2)
```

```{r}
#polarity_list %>% reduce(bind_rows) 

# remove cells with the 2nd longest neurite longer than 70 um
#polarity_list <- polarity_list %>% discard (function(x) min(x$max_2nd, na.rm = TRUE)  > 100)

# remove cells with minimal polarity index larger than 1.5
polarity_list <- polarity_list %>% discard (function(x) min(x$polarity, na.rm = TRUE)  > 1.5)

# remove cells with maximal polarity index smaller than 1.1
polarity_list <- polarity_list %>% discard (function(x) max(x$polarity, na.rm = TRUE)  < 1.1)
```

```{r  message = FALSE, warning=FALSE, fig.width=10}

df_summary %>% 
ggplot(aes(x=Time, y=mean)) +
   geom_ribbon(aes(ymin=mean-sd, ymax=mean+sd), fill="lightgrey")+
   geom_line(size=1, alpha=1) +
  
  # stat_peaks(colour = "red", span = 15, ignore_threshold = 0.5) +
 # stat_peaks(geom = "text", colour = "red", span = 15, ignore_threshold = 0.6, hjust = 2, angle = 0) +
 # stat_valleys(colour = "lightblue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9) +
# stat_valleys(geom = "text", colour = "blue", span = 13, ignore_threshold = 0.9, hjust = -0.5, angle = 0) +
  
   theme_ipsum(grid = F, ticks = T)+ 
  # geom_vline(xintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
 # geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dashed", color = "black")+
  # scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0), limits = c(0 ,2),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 6))+
  # scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0),  breaks = scales::pretty_breaks(n = 8), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  
  theme_linedraw()+
   theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none",
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

```{r}

polarity_list_2 <- list()

for (n in 1:length(polarity_list)){
  
  df <- polarity_list[[n]] %>% as.data.table()
  
  polarity_list_2[[n]] <- df[ ,.(Time, polarity, Cell)] 
  
}

polarity_df <- polarity_list_2 %>% reduce(bind_rows) 

df_summary <- polarity_df %>% group_by(Time) %>% rstatix::get_summary_stats(polarity, type = "common")
```

# Time-lagged cross-corrleation of outgrowth and retraction profiles
```{r warning=FALSE}
# constructing partial dependence (i.e., marginal effect) plots 
library(pdp)
theme_set(theme_bw())
mts_avg_list[[2]][ ,c("Length.2", "Length.4")] %>%  autoplot() +
  ylim(0, 45) +
  ggtitle (plot_title) +
  geom_line(aes(),size=1)  +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm"),panel.grid.major = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, face="bold")) #for centering the text
```

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.
